answer:
Close does not offer a free tier for developer API access. API access is a feature included with their paid CRM plans [1][2]. 

To use the API, you must subscribe to a paid plan and use either an API key or OAuth 2.0 for authentication [1][3]. While Close offers a free trial of their CRM that includes $5 of calling and enrichment credits [1][2], it is not a permanent free tier for API developers. Developers can manage their API integration using the base URL `https://api.close.com/api/v1` and following standard REST conventions [3].
